fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of this line.

fields.name: Service Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service item registered in the Service Item table and associated with the customer.

fields.name: Service Item Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the group associated with this service item.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item to which this posted service item is related.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number of this service item.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the service item specified in the Service Item No. field on this line.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional description of this service item.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service priority for this posted service item.

fields.name: Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the estimated hours between the creation of the service order, to the time when the repair status changes from Initial, to In Process.

fields.name: Response Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the estimated date when service starts on this service item.

fields.name: Response Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when service is expected to start on this service item.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when service on this service item started.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when service on this service item started.

fields.name: Finishing Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when service on this service item is finished.

fields.name: Finishing Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the service on the order is finished.

fields.name: Service Shelf No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service shelf where the service item is stored while it is in the repair shop.

fields.name: Warranty Starting Date (Parts)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the warranty starts on the service item spare parts.

fields.name: Warranty Ending Date (Parts)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the spare parts warranty expires for this service item.

fields.name: Warranty
fields.tooltip: Specifies that there is a warranty on either parts or labor for this service item.

fields.name: Warranty % (Parts)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of spare parts costs covered by the warranty for this service item.

fields.name: Warranty % (Labor)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of labor costs covered by the warranty on this service item.

fields.name: Warranty Starting Date (Labor)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the labor warranty for the posted service item starts.

fields.name: Warranty Ending Date (Labor)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the labor warranty expires on the posted service item.

fields.name: Contract No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contract associated with the posted service item.

fields.name: Location of Service Item
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the location of the service item specified on the line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Location of Service Item field on the service item line of the service order that was posted.

fields.name: Loaner No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the loaner that has been lent to the customer to replace this service item.

fields.name: Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor who sold this service item.

fields.name: Vendor Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number that the vendor uses for this item.

fields.name: Fault Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fault reason code assigned to the posted service item.

fields.name: Service Price Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service price group associated with this service item.

fields.name: Fault Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code that identifies the area of the fault encountered with this service item.

fields.name: Symptom Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code to identify the symptom of the service item fault.

fields.name: Fault Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code to identify the fault of the posted service item or the actions taken on the item.

fields.name: Resolution Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the resolution code assigned to this item.

fields.name: Fault Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that there is a fault comment for this service item.

fields.name: Resolution Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that there is a resolution comment for this service item.

fields.name: Accessory Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that there is an accessory comment for this service item. For example, this can be information about the accessories that the customer brings in with the item.
The program copies this information from the Service Item Line table. You cannot change the contents of this field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Actual Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip:
Contains the actual number of hours from the creation of the service order to the time when the service item repair status was changed from Initial to In Process.
The program copies this information from the Service Item Line table. You cannot change the contents of this field because the shipment has already been posted.

fields.name: Service Price Adjmt. Gr. Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the service price adjustment group code that applies to the service line from which the shipment was posted. You use price adjustment groups for adjustment of service pricing.
The program automatically copies the code from the Serv. Price Adjmt. Gr. Code field on the item line of the service order that is posted.
You cannot change the code in the field.

fields.name: Adjustment Type
fields.tooltip:
Contains the type of the price adjustment applicable to the current service item line. The adjustment type can be:


Field


Description


Fixed

The price adjustment must reach the exact amount specified for the service price group.


Maximum

The price adjustment should only be performed if the total price exceeds the amount specified on the service price group.


Minimum

The price adjustment should only be performed if the total amount is less than the amount specified on the service price group.


The information is copied from the Service Item Line table when you post the shipment.
You cannot change the adjustment type in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Base Amount to Adjust
fields.tooltip:
Contains the amount to which the service line linked to the shipped item was adjusted.
The program copies the value from the Base Amount to Adjust field in the Service Item Line table.
This field is not editable.

fields.name: No. of Active/Finished Allocs
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of active or finished resource allocations for this service item.
The program copies the value from the No. of Active/Finished Allocs field in the Service Item Line table. You cannot change the value in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the customer associated with the service contract.
This field contains the same information as the Customer No. field on the service header of the posted service order.
It is impossible to change the information in this field because the service shipment is already posted.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date interval that values are filtered by.
If this field contains starting and ending dates for a date interval, then other field values only show information for that interval.
You can enter a date interval according to the following rules.


Meaning


Sample expression


Entries that are included


Equal to

12 15 12

Only entries that are posted on December 15, 2012.


Interval

12 15 12..01 15 13
..12 15 12

Entries that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and January 15, 2013.
Entries that are posted on January 15, 2012, or earlier.


Either/or

12 15 12|12 16 12

Entries that are posted on either December 15, 2012, or December 16, 2012. If there are entries that are posted on both days, then all entries are displayed.


You can also combine the various format types.


Sample expression


Entries that are included


12 15 12|12 01 12..12 10 12

Entries that are posted either on December 15, 2012, or on dates between and including December 1, 2012, and December 10, 2012.


..12 14 12|12 30 12..

Entries that are posted on December 14, 2012, or earlier, or entries that are posted on December 30, 2012, or later, which includes all entries except those that are posted on dates between and including December 15, 2012, and December 29, 2012.

fields.name: Resource Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a resource filter.
If this field contains a resource number, fields such as No. of Allocations will display information on service order allocations with that particular resource only. The Service Tasks window will also show posted service item lines allocated to that particular resource (provided that you use allocation in your company).

fields.name: Allocation Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a date filter for allocations.
If this field contains the starting and ending dates for a time period, fields such as No. of Active/Finished Allocs will display information for that time period only.

fields.name: Resource Group Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a resource group filter.
If this field contains a resource number, the Service Tasks window will only show posted service item lines allocated to that particular resource group (provided that you use allocation in your company).

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the responsibility center (for example, a distribution center, a sales office or a plant planning office) assigned to the customer or associated with the shipment.
The program copies the code from the Responsibility Center field on the item line of the posted service order.
You cannot change the responsibility center code in the posted shipment.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


The dimension set ID is not edited directly by users. The value of the field is calculated with the dimension values that users select in the Edit Dimension Set Entries window.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.
